title: StopPlace
description: A physical location serving as a transit stop facility, comprising one or more quays, entrances, and associated infrastructure.

stopPlaceId.description: Unique identifier for the stop place

stopPlaceType.description: Type of stop place (e.g. AIRPORT, BUS_STATION, FERRY_STOP, METRO_STATION)

quays.description: Quays or boarding areas within this stop place

entrances.description: Entrances and pathways into this stop place

gps.description: GPS coordinates as a latitude,longitude string

geojson.description: GeoJSON geometry object representing this location
